title: pelargonium × lucidum
intro: Pelargonium × lucidum, also known as the Cape Geranium or South African Geranium, is a species of flowering plant within the family Geraniaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as fever, coughs, and sore throats. The health benefits of Pelargonium × lucidum include reducing inflammation, relieving stress and anxiety, and improving respiratory health. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
